column7: Enhances tiller number and panicle count; split N application at 3 growth stages recommended.
Supports rapid establishment; balanced NPK promotes uniform crop stand and early tiller development.
Improves grain protein and N accumulation; sulfur synergy reduces lodging in high-yield conditions.
Enhances grain filling and reduces chalkiness; K at PI stage improves overall grain quality.
Iron and zinc support crop vigor; brassinosteroid application at PI stage reduces spikelet sterility.
Humic acid improves nutrient retention; nano-K and algae extract support panicle development and grain weight.
Organic acids and root exudates improve K and P mobilization; supports sustainable intensification of inbred rice production.
Biological N fixation reduces input costs for inbred production; Azolla improves soil organic matter over multiple seasons.
Foliar NPK improves nutrient use efficiency; water-soluble application at critical stages maximizes inbred grain yield.
